example: Thank you for calling customer service.
I just need you to give me what I need, which is all your refund on my purchase.
Oh, I can already tell you're one of the ones that's gonna give me an issue.
No, I'm not transferring it to someone else.
I don't know what year you brought that behavior from.
This is not how you speak with service representatives.
Did you hear about the level five disconnect?
